description: You are a BIM Coordinator responsible for commissioning the FZK-Haus residential model for handover to the UK project team. The model is pre-loaded in Bonsai (BlenderBIM). Read the full classification specification from /home/ga/Desktop/uniclass_spec.txt and apply Uniclass 2015 classification codes to ALL building elements: all IfcWall elements must receive code Ss_25_16_94 (Wall systems), all IfcWindow elements must receive code Ss_25_96_57 (Window systems), all IfcDoor elements must receive code Ss_25_32_33 (Door systems), and all IfcSlab elements must receive code Ss_25_56_95 (Slab systems). Each classification must reference the 'Uniclass 2015' system and the 'Systems (Ss)' table. Save the classified model to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_classified.ifc.

metadata.pass_score_note: threshold=65. Max partial credit without passing: file_new(10)+system_correct(15)+1 element type partial = max ~42. Full walls+windows = 10+15+25+20=70, passes.
